personality_one_liner: An appetizing, warm, and highly functional food delivery experience that highlights the direct restaurant-to-user connection without visual clutter.

spacing.rule: Generous iOS-native rhythms. Content must never touch the screen edge without padding (lg or xl). Forms and rows breathe with vertical md/lg spacing. Hit targets minimum 44pt.

do's: Use expo-blur on bottom tab bar to let restaurant images softly bleed through.
Apply to sticky headers over scrolling menus.
Use for Floating Action Buttons or map overlays (e.g., Courier location chip).
dont's: Never blur body text cards or form fields.
Don't stack more than 2 blurred surfaces per screen.

screens.name: Auth / Role Selection
screens.purpose: Simple JWT email/password entry with role selection (Customer, Restaurant Owner, Courier).
screens.layout: Clean column layout. Hero logo top. Segmented control for Role (Customer | Restaurant | Courier). Email and password inputs floating. Full-width sticky pill button for Login/Register at bottom.

screens.name: Customer Home
screens.purpose: Discover restaurants natively without commission fluff.

states.empty: Illustration 'No restaurants found in your area yet.'
states.error: Failed to load feed. Retry CTA.

screens.layout: Top sticky search bar (glassmorphism if scrolled under). Horizontal scrollable chips for cuisines (Pizza, Burgers). Full-width or edge-to-edge featured restaurant cards with large imagery, name, rating, and prominent '0% Commission' badge. Bottom tab navigation.

screens.name: Restaurant Menu / Detail
screens.purpose: View categories and items of a selected restaurant.

states.loading: Skeleton of header and list rows.

screens.layout: Large hero image of restaurant exterior at the top with gradient scrim overlay holding restaurant name. Sticky category sub-navigation underneath. Vertical list of menu items (photo on right, text on left). Bottom FAB or sticky glass sheet showing Cart Total and 'Checkout' button.

screens.name: Checkout (Cash on Delivery)
screens.purpose: Finalize order using COD only, ensuring zero-commission clarity.
screens.layout: Summary of items. A strong, highlighted surfaceTertiary box explaining 'Pay at Door - No Platform Commission'. Delivery address input. Sticky primary CTA pinned at the bottom 'Place Order'.

screens.name: Order Tracking (Map)
screens.purpose: Live map view showing courier location and delivery status.

states.error: Unable to connect to live tracking.

screens.layout: Full-bleed react-native-maps view taking up the upper 60% of the screen. A persistent bottom sheet (using @gorhom/bottom-sheet) housing courier details (avatar, name, call button), ETA, and a step-by-step vertical status timeline.

screens.name: Restaurant Owner Dashboard
screens.purpose: Manage orders, menu, couriers, and mock subscription status.
screens.layout: Top row of stat cards (Active Orders, Total Couriers). A 'Subscription Active' badge in surfaceSecondary. Segmented controls to toggle between 'Live Orders' and 'Courier Fleet'. List view of orders with clear 'Assign Courier' button.

screens.name: Courier Dashboard
screens.purpose: View assigned orders and update delivery status/location.

states.empty: No assigned deliveries right now. Take a break!

screens.layout: Map preview at top highlighting current assigned route. Large card showing current active order details with big swipe-to-confirm or pressable pill buttons for 'Picked Up', 'On The Way', and 'Delivered'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply '1 iOS-Native Clean' personality with a warm Terracotta (#E05C36) accent instead of the banned blue/purple. This gives an appetizing, food-focused energy.
Implement react-native-maps for the tracking screen with a minimalist bottom sheet containing courier details and status timeline.
Ensure 'Cash on Delivery' and 'No Commission' messaging is distinctively styled in the Checkout flow to emphasize the app's core value proposition.
For all images that text sits on top of (e.g., Restaurant details header), implement the mandatory gradient-to-dark scrim pattern (transparent to >=70% surfaceInverse).
Keep navigation clear with distinct bottom tabs for the 3 different roles (Customer, Owner, Courier) depending on the authenticated state.
Implement multi-language toggle (EN/TR) cleanly in the profile/settings area using a segmented control or toggle row.
Add tactile feedback (haptics) on order placement, status changes by couriers, and adding items to cart.
